message:
fix(dolt): BEADS_DOLT_PORT always overrides config port (env > config)

Previously BEADS_DOLT_PORT only overrode cfg.ServerPort in test mode
(BEADS_TEST_MODE=1) or when metadata.json had no port configured.
This meant callers setting BEADS_DOLT_PORT were silently ignored when
metadata.json specified dolt_server_port: 3307, causing test databases
to leak onto the production Dolt server.

Now BEADS_DOLT_PORT always takes priority over metadata.json, following
standard env > config convention. Production is unaffected since
BEADS_DOLT_PORT is never set in production environments.

Fixes: hq-27t (12 clown noses and counting)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
